violations.text: Sandwiches and lasagna packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed inspector that new templates are in process. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025

Bags of ice and buckets of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC received new crates and began to place food items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -table-top prep unit -gaskets to 2-door reach -in -bakery display case (tape holding door). New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Ambient temperature of sandwich hot-hold unit was observed at 117 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Temperature setting was increased during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Turkey, chourice, cheese, sausage were observed held at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit in table-top prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were placed in unit this morning were moved to other refrigeration; foods that had been in unit overnight were disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in a plastic container greater than four inches deep. Staff placed in shallow pan and brought to freezer to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Sandwiches, lasagna, parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Ice was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Cases of beverages were observed stored on the floor in dry storage areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Utensils in the utensil crock (over ovens) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -table-top prep unit (not maintaining 41 degrees or colder) -gaskets to 2-door reach-in -bakery display case (tape holding door). New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025
Linguiça was observed in refrigerator beyond 7 days from opening. PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

Pasta salad, soups, and ice creams packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting, observed with a gap in the lower corner. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The table-top prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Inspector observed a leak in the unit under food pans. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on 3-door reach-in was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Bakery case located in the service area was not in good repair. Inspector observed digital display on unit at 45 degrees, and internal probe reading 47 degrees. No items requiring refrigeration to be stored in this unit until it maintains 41 degrees or colder. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
The door to the front and back toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

The stove hoods in kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
